content:
It sounds like you're feeling overwhelmed and unsure about what to do next. Before making any decisions, take some time to reflect on your feelings and priorities. Consider seeking support from a trusted friend, family member, or mental health professional who can provide a safe and non-judgmental space to discuss your concerns.

If you're looking for ways to improve your relationship, you might consider couples therapy or counseling. A professional can help you and your husband communicate more effectively, work through issues, and build a stronger connection.

If, however, you feel that your situation is not safe or healthy, there are resources available to support you. The National Domestic Violence Hotline (1-800-799-7233) and the National Coalition Against Domestic Violence (NCADV) are organizations that can provide you with information, support, and connections to local resources.

What do you think is the most pressing issue in your relationship, and what do you hope to achieve moving forward?
